name: mapglb
author: Farhan Dhrubo <https://github.com/farhanic017>
description: Map to GLB - Generate real-world 3D maps as GLB files with OctoCode integration

commands.remoteProcess: npm run mapglb:cli -- process --bounds south,west,north,east --remote https://server

tools.name: mapglb_remote_process
tools.description: Send selected map bounds to a remote GPU server and return processed building geometry

tools.name: mapglb_export_glb
tools.description: Export the current 3D scene as a GLB file

runtime.octocodeNote: OctoCode connects as MCP client - no special provider needed
